title: [FEATURE] Email mailbox management: list, move, mark-read/spam
description: Mailbox listing, move-to-folder, mark-as-read, mark-as-spam. Masked emails list/create/delete. Test via jmapc mocks.

title: [SETUP] Python+UV project scaffold with pyproject.toml
description: Initialize uv project structure, pyproject.toml with jmapc, caldav, carddav, webdavclient3, typer, pytest, pytest-cov. Add tox.ini for local testing.
close_reason: pyproject.toml + src/fmcli/ + tests/ scaffold, uv sync --dev + pytest --no-cov clean (jmapc pinned to >=0.2.0, latest is 0.2.23)

title: [FEATURE] Account class with JMAP/CalDAV/CardDAV client factories
description: Account(name, email, token, app_password). Methods: get_jmap_client(), get_caldav_client(), get_carddav_client(), get_webdav_client(). Write tests first (TDD).

title: [FEATURE] Contacts command: list, search, create, update, delete
description: Using pyCardDAV or raw CardDAV. Commands: fmcli contacts list --account=x, fmcli contacts search <name>, create, update, delete. TDD.

title: [TASK] README, CLI usage examples, API reference
description: README with multi-account setup, all commands, examples. Update as needed during development.

title: [FEATURE] Email command: list, search, read, send, reply
description: Using jmapc library. Commands: fmcli email list --account=x [--limit], fmcli email search --query=..., fmcli email read <id>, etc. Test with mock JMAP server.

title: [SETUP] Multi-account config file handling
description: Implement ~/.config/fmcli/config.toml parser for account profiles (name, email, token). Support --account flag and FMC_ACCOUNT env var. DI for config.

title: [TASK] Typer CLI framework setup, help, version, completions
description: Wire up typer. Add --version, --help, shell completions (bash/zsh/fish). Add fmcli account add/list/remove/default commands.

title: [FEATURE] Files command: list, download, upload, delete
description: Using webdavclient3 for Fastmail Files. Commands: fmcli files list, fmcli files download <path>, upload, delete. TDD.

title: [FEATURE] Calendar command: list events, create, update, delete
description: Using caldav library. Commands: fmcli calendar list --account=x --days=30, fmcli calendar create, fmcli calendar delete <id>. TDD with caldav mocks.

title: [EPIC] fmcli: Multi-account Fastmail CLI
description: Unified Python CLI for Fastmail (email/calendar/contacts/files) with multi-account support, TDD, Python+UV, replacing MCP servers.
